summary: A fortified castle or keep structure with a complex U-shaped footprint featuring a central tower, two corner towers with overhanging roofs, horizontal log-style striping on walls, and a white stone foundation. The building displays medieval fortress architecture with multiple levels and defensive elements.

shape.overall_form: U-shaped with central tower and flanking corner towers
shape.symmetry: Bilateral symmetry along central axis with tower at apex

rebuild_hints: Build central vertical tower first (approximately 2x2 blocks wide, 13 blocks tall)
Construct two corner towers at U-shape endpoints with overhanging roof caps
Connect towers with horizontal walls featuring alternating wood and stone log pattern
Apply white stone blocks as continuous foundation perimeter
Add overhanging slab roofs on all three towers with stepped appearance
Place small window openings on tower faces (approximately 2x2 blocks)
Ensure horizontal striping pattern alternates every 1-2 blocks vertically
Foundation extends approximately 1 block outward from main walls
uncertainties: Exact window placement and size difficult to determine from angles
Interior layout unclear from exterior views only
Precise block-by-block composition of striped walls uncertain
Whether structure has interior rooms or is primarily hollow
Exact height of each floor level
Presence of doors or entrances not clearly visible
Whether corner towers are solid or hollow structures
